Title: Cannibal
Writer: Humberto Arenal, Alejandro Hernández, Manuel Martín Cuenca
Actors: Antonio de la Torre, Olimpia Melinte, María Alfonsa Rosso
Plot: Carlos is the most prestigious tailor in Granada, but he's also a murderer in the shadows. He feels no remorse, no guilt, until Nina appears in his life and love awakens.
